response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience at companies like Stripe and Shopify, vastly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid fullstack role. While technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js) align well, the seniority mismatch creates significant retention risk and likely salary expectation gaps. Additionally, no explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience shown, and on-site presence requirement may conflict with senior profile expectations.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience from Stripe and Shopify
Broad fullstack expertise across web, mobile, and infrastructure
concerns: Massive seniority overqualification for entry-level role — high attrition risk
Salary expectations likely far exceed junior/mid budget
No explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience listed; primary DB is MongoDB
